name: add_hockey_puck
description: Adds a hockey puck (black cylinder) to the scene at the specified location.
signature: add_hockey_puck(x: float, y: float, z: float) -> dict
source_code:
async def add_hockey_puck(x, y, z):
    return await add_custom_object('hockey_puck', x, y, z, body_xml='<geom type="cylinder" size="0.03 0.01" rgba="0.1 0.1 0.1 1" mass="0.15" condim="4" friction="0.5 0.05 0.01"/>')
